name: @hasna/crawl
description: AI-powered web crawler — self-hosted Firecrawl alternative. Crawl, extract, render JS, search. CLI + MCP + REST API + Dashboard.

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external playwright --external playwright-core --external e2b && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external playwright --external playwright-core --external e2b && bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun --external playwright --external playwright-core --external e2b && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external playwright --external playwright-core --external e2b && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist

author: Andrei Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
